feedback.text: Hello, as a consumer, I would like you to include the prevention of the destruction of video games by the publisher. In particular, those for which the consumer has paid. Many video games require a constant connection with the publisher’s servers, which inevitably turn out permanently on a day-to-day basis. The game bought, even in physical form, will become an inert winner. Therefore, I would like to ask for some form of prevention of the destruction of goods I have paid for. Thank you, an EU citizen.
